article_meta.title: Senate Democrats renew government shutdown threat as tensions flare with Trump by Alexander Bolton 12/22/25 06:00 AM ET

reasoning: The model mixed valid and invalid flags, used non-listed bias types, falsely flagged quoted language, and missed multiple clear instances of author-level spin and loaded wording in the prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: It flagged a source’s quoted metaphor ('dynamite/grenade') as author bias, violating attribution rules.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most items were not genuine author-prose bias: temporal/date issue, an attributed claim framed as author fact, and a balanced context paragraph miscast as omission; plus the quoted language.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-prose biases such as 'bombshell,' 'very much alive,' 'red flag warning,' 'without even,' and 'jam Senate Democrats again with a partisan stop-gap.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-specified labels (e.g., Temporal/Framing/Attribution/Selection) instead of the defined taxonomy; even the one defensible instance had an off-label type.
